user_query:
Create a dual-platform content plan for Xiaohongshu and Pinterest based on the inputs in input/. Read input/briefing.json for the briefing, input/EXTEND.md for preferences (including brand colors), and input/keywords.csv for Pinterest SEO keywords. Deliverables:

1) Write a complete plan to output/plan.md using the exact section headers and field labels from the Output Template (keep the same emoji headers and field names):
- "## 📸 视觉方案" with: 画面描述, 构图, 色调 (use exactly the three brand hex colors from input/EXTEND.md), 封面文字 (max 8 characters), and optional AI绘图提示词.
- "## ✍️ 小红书文案" with: 标题 (max 20 characters), 正文 (≤800 characters, include at least one emoji), 标签 (5–10 tags beginning with #), 发布时间 (include a specific time that is not on the hour and a reason). The Xiaohongshu title and body must contain Chinese characters.
- "## 📌 Pinterest Copy" with: Title (≤100 chars), Description (≤500 chars). Include at least 3 keywords from input/keywords.csv in the Description and make sure the first ~40 characters include core keywords. Include Board and Post Time (UTC, not on the hour, with a reason). The Pinterest section must be entirely in English and contain no Chinese characters.
- "## 🎯 运营动作" with: 首条自评, 3 回复模板 variations, 系列规划 (at least two future posts), 真人感检查清单 (checkbox list).
- "## Character Count Verification" table present (the table lines and headers must appear), but it’s okay if I independently verify counts.

2) Write a separate file output/diagnosis.md listing 1–3 fatal weaknesses you identify in the idea (rooted in the briefing and platforms), each with three lines labeled exactly as: "Symptom:", "Diagnosis:", and "Fix:". Keep them specific and actionable.

Additional rules:
- Use the brand color hex codes from input/EXTEND.md in the 色调 line of the visual plan.
- Do not include any Chinese characters in the Pinterest section.
- Use at least 3 keywords from input/keywords.csv in the Pinterest Description.
- Both posting times (Xiaohongshu and Pinterest) must not be on the hour (e.g., 19:23 or 20:17). Include a brief reason for each time.

Save only these two files: output/plan.md and output/diagnosis.md.
